evals.prompt: Improve the docs wiki before I open a PR
evals.expected_output: Runs strict pipeline on docs/wiki.yaml via audit.sh or equivalent commands; produces automated checks scorecard and prioritized findings table with evidence.
expectations: Output mentions fmt, lint, check, and render
Uses -c docs/wiki.yaml or equivalent config path
Produces a structured pass/fail report with a findings table
Findings include category and evidence (file:line or CLI excerpt)

evals.prompt: I changed docs/wiki/Deploying_to_GitHub_Pages.md — anything I should verify?
evals.expected_output: Scoped audit on the changed file plus deploy alignment notes (-c, --site-base-url, upload-pages-artifact path) in findings table.
expectations: Runs lint or check scoped to the changed file or full wiki
Mentions deploy alignment (site-base-url or artifact path)
Does not modify wiki files without explicit request

evals.prompt: Audit my wiki — lint is failing on broken links in wiki/Foo.md
evals.expected_output: Single-file lint --strict with broken link output cited in findings table; distinguishes lint reporting from wiki link --fix-broken repair.
expectations: Runs wiki lint --strict on the target file
Cites or summarizes lint output for broken links with evidence
Mentions wiki link --fix-broken as optional repair, separate from lint

evals.prompt: Audit my wiki — wiki check fails with unknown top-level keys in wiki.yaml
evals.expected_output: Config load error cited as config finding; points to CHANGELOG Migration; no config migrate or rename hints in error strings.
expectations: Reports config load or unknown key error with evidence
Categories finding as config or mentions wiki.yaml schema
Mentions CHANGELOG or Migration for upgrades
Does not suggest config migrate or per-key rename hints
